overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game showing a character in power armor exploring an abandoned urban street. The character walks through a desolate city environment with crumbling pavement, overgrown vegetation, and derelict buildings under bright morning sunlight.

agents.ego_description: character in power armor walking steadily down the center of the derelict street

entered.detail: row of abandoned shops with faded red and orange awnings
multi-story brick residential buildings with boarded windows
cracked asphalt street with weeds growing through fissures
leafless trees lining the center of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow abandoned street lined with derelict shops on the left and brick apartment buildings on the right. The cracked pavement is dotted with patches of snow or ash, and bare trees stand in the distance as morning sunlight filters through the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with abandoned vehicles and ornate architecture

events.description: exits narrow street corridor into wider intersection with open sky
character turns left at the intersection to proceed down new street

agents.ego_description: character navigates the intersection, turning left around a large stone building corner

entered.detail: large corner building with arched doorways and striped stone facade
half-timbered building with distinctive dark wooden beams
rusted red delivery van with faded circular logo on the side
circular green and red structure with glass panels and checkered base

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at an intersection into a more open area, passing a large ornate stone building and a rusted red delivery truck. An art deco style kiosk stands on the left while a distinctive half-timbered building becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with vault-tec facility wall and overhead structures

events.description: character raises weapon and targeting reticle appears on screen

agents.ego_description: character walks forward while aiming weapon at the environment, scanning the area

entered.detail: large wall with distinctive yellow and blue circular vault-tec logo
gantry structure with traffic lights and decorations spanning the street
wooden sawhorse barriers blocking part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the open street passing a wall with a large Vault-Tec logo on the right. Overhead, a traffic light gantry spans the road ahead while the character raises their weapon to scan the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown market street with colorful awnings

events.description: character passes directly underneath the overhead traffic light structure

agents.ego_description: character continues walking toward the market area with dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: abandoned market stalls with bright red fabric awnings
market stalls with teal and blue colored awnings
thick bushes and weeds overtaking the street center

segments.scene_description: The character walks underneath the traffic light gantry and continues toward a densely overgrown market area. Abandoned stalls with red and blue awnings line both sides of the street as vegetation encroaches on the broken pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban corridor that transitions from a narrow, shadowed street into a wide, overgrown marketplace. It begins by tracking the character past derelict shops and brick apartments where morning sunlight filters through bare trees and patches of ash on the cracked pavement. As the character turns left at an intersection, the environment opens up to reveal an ornate stone building, a rusted red delivery truck, and an art deco kiosk. The scene then expands further along an open road, passing a large Vault-Tec logo on a wall before the character raises their weapon to scan the area beneath a spanning traffic light gantry. Finally, the camera moves under the gantry and pushes forward into a densely overgrown market area where abandoned stalls with red and blue awnings are being reclaimed by encroaching vegetation.
